sources.name: Australian Warning System
sources.pipelineUse: Defines Advice, Watch and Act, and Emergency Warning scenario levels.
sources.notes: Used by the rule engine labels and historical scenario structure.

sources.name: VicEmergency
sources.pipelineUse: Primary official public emergency information reference.
sources.notes: Used as a public source reference; formal data-feed access requires approval.

sources.name: VicEmergency public events GeoJSON
sources.pipelineUse: Public current incident/warning feed checked by the backend for Current Official Mode.
sources.notes: Public endpoint responds as GeoJSON; proof-of-concept use only.

sources.name: VicEmergency impact areas GeoJSON
sources.notes: Not currently used to choose the display state.

sources.name: VICSES Maribyrnong City Council flood guide
sources.pipelineUse: Preparedness actions and local flood guide context.
sources.notes: Official guidance page, not a live API.

sources.name: Maribyrnong Council River Watch
sources.pipelineUse: Local council flood information and resident support context.
sources.notes: Official local council page, not a live API.

sources.name: Melbourne Water Maribyrnong River flood model/maps
sources.pipelineUse: Historical scenario context for Maribyrnong River flood extent/risk.
sources.notes: Map/model reference, not a simple live API.

sources.name: Melbourne Water rainfall and river levels
sources.notes: Interactive app and CSV download source; not a simple public JSON API.

sources.name: BOM Water Data Online
sources.notes: Public service; API use requires careful WaterML/SOS handling and rate-limit awareness.

sources.name: Victorian Ombudsman Maribyrnong/Rivervue flood-risk report
sources.pipelineUse: Historical context for October 2022 Maribyrnong River flood and Rivervue impacts.
sources.notes: Public accountability report, not a live warning source.
